DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/dls/region.description:

Like creating a binding, this requires **IP Prefixes Write** in addition to **DLS Write**.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/dls/regional_.description: List the BYOIP prefix bindings configured for an account.

parameters.description: Opaque token for cursor-based pagination. Omit for the first page. Pass the value from a previous response to fetch the next page.
parameters.name: cursor

error_chain.description: Optional upstream error context for APIv4 errors that wrap downstream service failures.
Optional upstream error context for APIv4 errors that wrap downstream service failures.

prefix_id.description: The ID of the parent prefix.

region_key.description: The region key used for the binding.

count.description: Number of items in the current page.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page. Empty string when there are no more results.

per_page.description: Maximum number of items per page.

Like creating a binding, this requires **IP Prefixes Write** in addition to **DLS Write**.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/dls/regional.description:
Bind a CIDR from a BYOIP prefix to a region.

This requires the **IP Prefixes Write** permission in addition to **DLS Write**, because the binding is created against a BYOIP prefix in Addressing.

cidr.description: IP prefix in CIDR notation to bind.

prefix_id.description: The ID of the parent IP prefix that contains the CIDR.

error_chain.description: Optional upstream error context for APIv4 errors that wrap downstream service failures.
